source_pr.title: executor: support chunk for IndexLookupReader.
source_pr.body: And decouple indexWorker and tableWorker from index lookup executor.

symptoms: rs, err := tk.Exec("select * from chk order by k") (new_session_test.go)

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR refactors IndexLookupReader to support chunk-based execution and decouples internal workers, touching a large amount of executor/distsql code and adding new tests. The patch does not clearly show a targeted stabilization fix for an intermittent/flaky failure (it is largely a feature/refactor for execution format), so we conservatively classify it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
